articles.description: Everton midfielder James Garner and Brighton goalkeeper Jason Steele are named by Thomas Tuchel in an expanded 35-man England squad.
articles.title: England squad: Uncapped James Garner and Jason Steele named by Thomas Tuchel in England squad

articles.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan creates more snooker history by making the sport's highest-ever professional break with a 153 at the World Open in Yushan.
articles.title: World Open: Ronnie O'Sullivan makes highest-ever professional break with historic 153

articles.description: All the latest as Thomas Tuchel names his penultimate England squad to face Uruguay and Japan in friendlies next week.
articles.title: Tuchel to name penultimate England squad before World Cup

articles.description: There is increased scrutiny of Chelsea head coach Liam Rosenior, with his decision not to name a first-choice goalkeeper chief among the criticism he now faces.
articles.title: Chelsea goalkeepers: Has Rosenior's rotation of Sanchez and Jorgensen made situation worse?

articles.description: All the latest Premier League news conferences as Eddie Howe, Arne Slot and Fabian Hurzeler speak before the final weekend before the international break.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE - team news and previews: Howe, Hurzeler and Slot speaking before weekend

articles.description: Entering a football match in England and Wales without a ticket will become a criminal offence under new laws.
articles.title: Tailgating at football matches to become criminal offence

articles.description: Luke Littler comes from 5-0 down to stun Gerwyn Price 6-5 in the final of Premier League Darts in Dublin where there were two maximum 170 checkouts in one game.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Luke Littler stuns Gerwyn Price after two 170 finishes

articles.description: Head coach John Mitchell includes a clutch of new faces in England's Women's Six Nations squad as he aims to build on September's Rugby World Cup triumph.
articles.title: Red Roses: Seven uncapped players in England's Women's Six Nations squad

articles.description: Tony Pulis on why more should be done to help youngsters in the academy system, especially the majority who do not make it as professionals.
articles.title: Tony Pulis column: Why the academy system needs an overhaul

articles.description: Fifa fines the Israeli Football Association 150,000 Swiss Francs (£141,700) and warns it about its future conduct after investigating an "alleged offence of discrimination" by the Palestine FA.
articles.title: Israel FA fined for 'discrimination and racist abuse' by Fifa
